case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. ANDREW RUCKER

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUCKER, ANDREW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
